001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.Embedded;
004import androidx.room.Relation;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Batch;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
007import java.util.List;
008
009public class BatchWithEggGroups {
010
011  @Embedded
012  private Batch batch;
013
014  @Relation(
015      parentColumn = "batch_id",
016      entityColumn = "batch_id",
017      entity = EggGroup.class
018  )
019  private List<EggGroup> groups;
020
021  public Batch getBatch() {
022    return batch;
023  }
024
025  public void setBatch(Batch batch) {
026    this.batch = batch;
027  }
028
029  public List<EggGroup> getGroups() {
030    return groups;
031  }
032
033  public void setGroups(List<EggGroup> groups) {
034    this.groups = groups;
035  }
036}
